title: [agentfix] AttributeError: The User model in models.py defines the email attribute, but repository.
body:
## Error Summary
- Service: `unknown-service`
- Environment: `unknown`
- Exception: `AttributeError: 'User' object has no attribute 'email_address'`

## Root Cause
The User model in models.py defines the email attribute, but repository.py line 66 incorrectly accesses email_address attribute, causing AttributeError.

## Code Changes
- `src/demo_service/repository.py`

## Validation
- `G:\AgentFix\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m py_compile src/demo_service/repository.py` -> 0

## Risk / Human Review
- The User model in models.py clearly shows 'email' attribute, not 'email_address'
- Tests indicate expected behavior: test_get_email_domain_success expects 'example.com'
- No other files need changes since the bug is isolated to incorrect attribute reference
